surface: M3 SDK policy simulation client helper
noTouch: dashboard UI or operator HTTP usage endpoint

checks.browser: skip: SDK/server-side docs and local smoke path only; no browser UI changes in scope

downshiftProof: route-local because this adds one SDK method over an existing local gateway endpoint plus focused tests/docs/smoke assertions; it does not add live network calls, Docker, sponsor keys, durable storage, dashboard UI, or browser credential exposure
knownFailures: New SDK simulatePolicy tests first failed because createGasKitClient did not expose simulatePolicy.
notes: Adds client.simulatePolicy() as a server-side typed helper for POST /v1/policy/simulate. Policy rejections return as decision data, while auth and malformed transport responses continue to throw SDK errors. Smoke now exercises simulation through the SDK without upstream calls or event emissions.
